user.title: Add household member
user.description: Pick a name for this person and the diet they follow on kuchniavikinga.pl. You can add the integration multiple times — one entry per household member.

error.diet_invalid: Pick a diet from the list.

abort.no_diets_found: Could not find any diets on the menu page.
